entries.description: Operator set pathAwareCritique: required.

Registered S1 start; read project-guidance, lessons-learned, session-set-authoring-guide, repo-worktree-layout.md, Set 067 pull_verifier.py + tool-contract.md, worktree.py, L-067-1; baseline suite 1519 passed / 1 skipped; confirmed re2 NOT installed (subprocess+timeout is the live ReDoS path).

Authored ai-assignment.md via route(task_type=analysis); recorded routed next-orch rec for S2 (switch to sonnet-class for the analysis-heavy re-grade, with the statistical-rigor caveat for the operator). Routed cost $0.0056.

Finalized run-test-contract.md: disposable-detached-worktree lifecycle, bounded operator-authored command surface, raw result shape, caps, and the precise (re-scoped) disposable-CWD isolation scope (NOT an OS sandbox).

Implemented ai_router/run_test_sandbox.py: run_subprocess_capped (shell=False, hard wall-clock kill of the process tree, temp-file-bounded output cap + raw elision), run_test_in_cage (git worktree add --detach -> run write-confined cwd -> crash-safe finally teardown with prune --expire now + registration leak check), run_test_caps_from_config.

Relocated grep ReDoS defense onto the cage machinery: new ai_router/regex_worker.py (subprocess, re2-inline fast path else killable subprocess) via isolated_regex_search; pull_verifier._canonical_grep now delegates the regex EVALUATION (walk+confinement stay), the 0.21.1 nesting heuristic demoted to a cheap pre-filter.

Wired run_test into pull_verifier: RunTestConfig + _run_test_tool_schema + _dispatch_run_test; offered ONLY when run_test_config passed (default loop byte-for-byte the Set 067 read-only set); dispatched to the cage OUTSIDE the byte-equality guard, recorded as a real probe. Added run_test caps block to router-config.yaml + exports from __init__.py.

Added ai_router/tests/test_run_test_sandbox.py (cage lifecycle, timeout-kill, output cap, write-confinement, teardown-on-exception + leak surfacing, caps-from-config, ReDoS isolation, worker) + 4 run_test wiring tests in test_pull_verifier.py.

Cross-provider verification gpt-5.4 (high): R1 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Critical write-confinement overclaim re-scoped per L-064-8; 1 Major teardown prune-order+leak-surfacing; 1 Minor elision partial-line; ALSO fixed a latent Windows  multi-match grep bug found writing the Minor test) -> R2 ISSUES_FOUND (Critical re-scope echoes missed per L-065-1; Major prune --expire now; new Minor leak-render dropped raw output) -> R3 VERIFIED. ~$0.436.

Registered S2 start (claude-opus-4-8 high, operator-confirmed at boundary over the routed sonnet rec, on statistical-rigor grounds). Read project-guidance, lessons-learned, session-set-authoring-guide, ai-led-session-workflow, spec, Set 067 experiment-a-results.md (incl. §8 erratum), audit.json, grade.py, catalogue.json, raw/.

Symmetric re-grade of Experiment A. Applied the identical strict quoted-mechanism rule to path-aware (B1/B2) x cross-file cells (audit-symmetric.json): exactly ONE removal, B1:D12 (token spillover from the D9 finding; B1 never names the isidentifier single-arg mechanism). Reproducible regrade.py over committed raw. Findings: GPT B1-A1 EXCEEDS band under all regimes incl audit-free primary (+0.2315); Gemini B2-A2 INSIDE band under the pre-registered primary (+0.0833 < 0.111). Cross-file strict survival routed 2/8 vs path-aware 13/14. Corrected erratum: only D5 is audit-INDEPENDENT existence proof (routed never matched it); D9 is audit-conditional (routed automated-matched a wrong-mechanism docstring nitpick). H1 direction CONFIRMED audit-independent; magnitude GPT-only resolvable; H2 magnitude exploratory. Wrote experiment-a-regrade.md.

Pre-registered Experiment B (staged-snapshot cadence intervention). Core mechanism: a coupling defect is in-snippet@introduction but migrates to cross-file@close, so per-session routed gets its one strong-window shot before dependents are built. Arms R(per-session routed, status quo)/E(end-of-set path-aware, replacement)/Q(end-of-set routed, PURE cadence control)/P(optional). Defect taxonomy: coupling_depth x vis@intro -> cadence-payoff / coupling-blind / no-coupling(null). Pre-committed deterministic rework cost_model.py (ships w/ invariant self-tests, PASS) separates empirical catch-timing from fixed rework; only empirical input is catch snapshot. Falsifiable decision rule (holds/does-not-hold/unresolved) keyed off R-vs-Q (cadence isolation) + cost saving concentrated in coupling class + no-coupling null. Pilot gate before paid sweep (L-067-3); L-067-1 GPT budget mitigations recorded. Wrote experiment-b-preregistration.md + experiment-b/{cost_model.py,harness-skeleton.md}.
Confirmed no production-code change this session (testpaths=ai_router/tests; docs scripts not collected). Full pytest suite GREEN: 1548 passed, 1 skipped (unchanged from S1 close baseline).

Cross-provider verification (gpt-5.4, high). R1 ISSUES_FOUND 1 Minor + 2 Major: (Minor) re-grade conservative-floor overclaim; (Major) Exp B union-over-K primary not stability-binding + imprecise band; (Major) missing vis_at_close_for_Q -> migration not operationalized, Q could still see defect. Remediated all: computed sym-audited replicate means (GPT +0.287, Gemini +0.278 both EXCEED band; Gemini effect was MASKED not absent); made Exp B primary per-repeat with binding >=2/3 realized-early-catch gate + pinned single band rule; added vis_at_close_for_Q axis + pinned Q_surface_files + always-visible control + min counts. R2: Finding1 RESOLVED, Findings2/3 PARTIAL (median made binding w/o band; Q surface contradictory across deliverables). Remediated: unified every decisive quantity as per-repeat contrast X_k w/ band=range, mean_k authoritative + median sign-check only; Q=Q_surface_files EVERYWHERE. R3 VERIFIED (1 Minor wording: equivalently-claim in S8 -> fixed). Spend R1 $0.350 + R2 $0.146 + R3 $0.107 = ~$0.603.

Routed next-orchestrator rec for S3 via route(task_type=analysis): claude-sonnet-4-6/medium (well-defined harness code + sweep + analysis on the S2-pre-registered design; avoids gpt-5.4-as-orchestrator per L-067-1; preserves gpt-5.4+gemini as experiment subjects/verifier). Operator confirms at S3 boundary. Cost $0.0028.

Registered S3 start (claude-opus-4-8 high; S2 routed rec was sonnet/medium but the S2 disposition flagged the statistical-honesty analysis as opus-warranted at the S3 boundary, matching S1/S2 - operator started this session on opus).

Built the staged-snapshot harness on the S1 run_test cage: build_snapshots.py (numkit, 5 monotone snapshots), catalogue.json (12 defects across the 4 taxonomy classes; invariants + min counts asserted PASS), run_arms.py (R/Q/E per provider K=3, raw-first, run_test cage for E via temp git repo), grade.py (per-repeat first-catch, cost_model, decision-rule contrasts/bands).

Ran the pilot (google R/Q/E + GPT path-aware convergence check) per prereg Sec10 - it caught a real seed defect (coupling-blind docstrings leaked the cross-file contract; fixed code to the FIXED taxonomy before spending), then the full K=3 two-provider sweep (42 cells, no errors, all E arms converged with verdicts). run_test exercised live in arm E. ~$0.70 metered.

Graded + symmetric mechanism audit (audit.json, no removals - all catches verified real). Wrote experiment-b-results.md: cadence MECHANISM real (R realizes early window 5/5 both providers; R earlier/cheaper than Q AND E on cadence-payoff) BUT controls not clean (no-coupling s=1.0 surface artifact via BD12; always-visible s=3.0 pure earliness) -> A3 fails, B3 fires -> pre-registered verdict CADENCE DEFENSE DOES NOT HOLD via clause B3 (not B1: not no-cadence-value). S4 input: demote/retire-leaning, narrow R-vs-E rework-timing edge the countervailing consideration.

Cross-provider verification (gpt-5.4 high): R1 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major arm-E capability overstatement [E gemini misses BD6 Critical, not 1 minor; E_google catches only 1 of 2 coupling-blind] + 3 Minor: grade.py evidence-file wording, mean/median sign-agreement not folded into resolved, run_test live-use not cited) -> all fixed + echoes propagated (L-065-1) -> R2 (all resolved, 1 trivial new docstring nit) -> R3 VERIFIED. ~$0.556 verification.

Routed next-orchestrator rec for S4 via route(task_type=analysis): claude-sonnet-4-6/medium (S4 = route the keep/demote/retire decision through consensus + small well-scoped config/doc implementation; not large coding; avoids gpt-5.4 orchestrator budget risk L-067-1).

Registered S4 (Routed keep/demote/retire decision). Read project-guidance, lessons-learned, spec, experiment-a-regrade.md, experiment-b-results.md, decision-time-consensus mechanics, and router-config verification wiring. Orchestrator opus-4-8 high (operator override of routed sonnet-4-6/medium rec, continuing S1-S3 statistical-honesty pattern flagged in S3 disposition).

Routed the keep/demote/retire decision through cross-provider decision-time consensus (bias-cautions preamble + devils-advocate two-pass on a long-lived-contract decision). Consulted the two NON-orchestrator providers gpt-5-4 + gemini-pro, Pass A (neutral 3-option) + Pass B (steelman KEEP). ALL FOUR consults converge on DEMOTE; both Pass B steelmans built the strongest honest KEEP case then found it not decisive. Shared shape: make end-of-set path-aware critique + the S5 contract-test gate the PRIMARY surface; retain per-session routed GATED on coupling/blast-radius (programmatic diff heuristic, not subjective judgment); TRANSITION GUARD = do NOT hard-cut until the S5 gate is live; reopen RETIRE only on later telemetry. Raw outputs in routed-fate-consensus/, journal routed-fate-consensus-journal.jsonl. Consult spend ~$0.167. Next: operator confirms.

Implemented DEMOTE (operator-confirmed): authored routed-fate-decision.md (consensus + operator rationale, demote target state, transition guard, gating heuristic, reopen-RETIRE telemetry criteria); added Verification-surface policy subsection + Step 6 forward-pointer to docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md; added comment-only anchor to router-config.yaml verification block. NO behavioral flag flipped - per the transition guard, per-session routed stays MANDATORY until the S5 contract gate lands. Suite 1548 passed/1 skipped (unchanged; config change comment-only). Config loads OK.

Cross-provider session verification (gpt-5-4, different provider than opus orchestrator): Round 1 CLEAN -> VERIFIED, zero issues. complexity 69, not escalated, ~$0.104. Up-front conventions block (suite baseline + no-behavioral-cutover-by-design + B3-not-B1 evidence framing) per L-064-10 kept R1 focused. Raw verdict in s4-verification.md.

Registered S5 (claude-opus-4-8/high; next-orch-rec suggested sonnet-4-6 but operator launched opus). Read project-guidance, lessons-learned, spec S5, routed-fate-decision (DEMOTE+transition-guard), run-test-contract (S1 cage API), experiment-a-regrade (H1/H4), path_aware_critique + dedicated_verification (posture mirror), close_session gate wiring, router-config verification block.

Pinned contract-gate-design.md: deterministic floor mirroring Set 066 path-aware (produce->validate); per-set contractGate attr; manifest+floor-result artifacts; coverage rule (probeable must be covered; non-probeable=agent residual); posture model.

Built ai_router/contract_gate.py (policy attr machinery, manifest+floor-result pure-Python validators per L-066-1, floor producer driving S1 cage, validate_contract_gate close-out, CLI run/validate) + __init__ exports.

Wired contract gate into close_session.py (set-terminal, required hard-TTY/soft-headless, advisory soft, none skip, fail-open, corrupt-log warning) + router-config comment anchor. Added docs/contract-gate.md + 2 JSON schemas + 2 example fixtures.
Added test_contract_gate.py + test_contract_gate_close.py + test_contract_gate_schema.py (84 tests). Full suite 1632 pass / 1 skip (baseline 1548 + 84).

Cross-provider verification routed to gpt-5-4 (different provider than opus orchestrator; MANDATORY per S4 transition guard). R1 ISSUES_FOUND 1 Major (malformed-but-parseable activity-log silently disarms required gate / raises past never-raises contract) -> fixed via shared _read_activity_entries shape-guard. R2 ISSUES_FOUND 2 Majors (UnicodeDecodeError uncaught; non-dict entries silently filtered) -> both fixed (catch UnicodeError; flag any non-dict element as corruption; writer refuses). R3 VERIFIED. ~$0.442 total. +9 hardening tests; contract-gate tests 93 pass.
Registered S6 (final): synthesis + docs + release + dogfood + close. Read S1-S5 deliverables + required guidance.

Wired the routed-gate predicate (ai_router/routed_gate.py +27 tests): executes the S4 DEMOTE cut-over -- per-session routed verification mandatory -> GATED on a deterministic blast-radius/coupling predicate. Exported from __init__.

Flipped the workflow default: docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md Step 6 + Session-def + Cross-Provider-Verification echoes + diagram (mandatory -> gated; transition guard cleared) + router-config.yaml verification anchor + live routed_gate sub-block.
Authored docs/verification-surface-strategy.md -- the settled synthesis; supersedes the Set 065 proposal open questions.
Updated ai_router/docs/close-out.md + pull-verifier.md. Prepared adversarial-critique-prompt.md. Refined L-067-1.
pyproject 0.21.1 -> 0.22.0; fixed stale __version__ 0.20.0 -> 0.22.0 (dogfood-caught); CHANGELOG 0.22.0; change-log.md S2-S6; routed next-set rec (Set 069). Operator pushes tag v0.22.0.

pathAwareCritique=required dogfood via the automated producer over the full repo-root sandbox (google VERIFIED + openai ISSUES); real findings folded (version drift + 2 workflow echoes per L-065-1). Gate OK (2 distinct providers).
Cross-provider session verification gpt-5-4 (S6 diff trips the predicate -> REQUIRED): R1 FAIL -> fixes -> R2 PASS. Full suite 1668 passed / 1 skip.
